error.title: Oops, something went wrong
error.description: Our team is fixing it. Please try again in a moment!

about.label: About Us
about.heroTitle:
Heritage Flavors,
Now at Your Home
about.heroDesc: Dapur Dekaka (德卡) is a premium Chinese-Indonesian frozen food producer from Bandung, bringing down family recipes with MUI halal standards to all of Indonesia.
about.storyP1: Starting from a small kitchen in Turangga, Bandung, Dapur Dekaka was born from a dream to bring authentic Chinese-Indonesian flavors to every Indonesian household.
about.storyP2: With decades of experience crafting quality frozen food, we present products like dimsum, siomay, bakso, and lumpia made from selected ingredients and hygienic production processes.
about.storyP3: Every Dapur Dekaka product is equipped with MUI halal certification, so you don't have to worry about the halal status of our products. We believe quality and religious beliefs are not a choice — they are the standard.
about.qualityDesc: We only use high-quality ingredients, carefully selected by our experts to ensure perfect taste and texture.
about.halalDesc: All products are MUI halal certified. Halal is not just a label, it is our promise to every customer.
about.coldChainDesc: From our kitchen to your doorstep, our cold chain is strictly maintained to ensure the freshness and quality of our products.
about.productionDesc: All Dapur Dekaka products are produced at our facility at Jl. Sinom V No. 7, Turangga, Bandung. Bandung was chosen not without reason — the city is known as the best Chinese-Indonesian culinary center in Indonesia, and we are proud to be part of that culinary tradition.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to taste our premium frozen food?
about.ctaDesc: Order now and enjoy free shipping on your first purchase. Shipped across Indonesia with maintained cold chain.

policy.privacyLastUpdated: Last updated: May 2026 — In accordance with Law No. 27 of 2022 on Personal Data Protection (UU PDP)
policy.dataCollectedDesc: Dapur Dekaka collects the following personal data to process orders and provide the best service:
policy.dataItemAddressDesc: to ship products to your location
policy.dataItemPaymentDesc: processed by Midtrans, not stored on our servers
policy.dataItemHistoryDesc: for customer service and loyalty points
policy.purposeItem1: Processing and shipping frozen food orders
policy.purposeItem2: Sending order status notifications via WhatsApp and email
policy.purposeItem3: Providing loyalty points and personal promotions
policy.purposeItem4: Fulfilling legal obligations and tax regulations (VAT)
policy.protectionItem1: SSL/TLS encryption for all data transmission
policy.protectionItem2: Secure storage in Neon PostgreSQL database
policy.protectionItem3: Limited access only for authorized staff
policy.protectionItem4: Not selling or sharing data to third parties for marketing purposes
policy.retentionDesc: Personal data is stored as long as the account is active and as long as needed for legal purposes. You can request data deletion at any time — all personal data will be anonymized or deleted from the system, except data that must be stored for legal/tax purposes (invoices, transaction records for a minimum of 10 years).
policy.rightsItem3: Request deletion of data under certain conditions
policy.rightsItem6: File a complaint with the data protection authority
policy.cookiesDesc: The dapurdekaka.com website uses cookies for:
policy.cookiesFuncDesc: remembering cart items and language preferences
policy.cookiesAnalyticsDesc: understanding how visitors use the site
policy.cookiesDisable: You can disable cookies through your browser settings.
policy.whatsappBusinessDesc: When you contact us via WhatsApp, chats are recorded on WhatsApp Business for customer service purposes. Conversation data is handled according to WhatsApp Business privacy policy. We do not use WhatsApp data for marketing purposes.
policy.changesDesc: This privacy policy may be updated from time to time. Significant changes will be announced through the website and/or email. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the latest policy.
policy.contactDesc: For questions about privacy policy or to request data deletion, contact:
policy.contactAddress: Or send mail to: Jl. Sinom V No. 7, Turangga, Bandung 40261, Indonesia
policy.noRefundDesc: Given the nature of our products as frozen food, all Dapur Dekaka products cannot be returned after receipt. This is in accordance with Indonesian food safety regulations that do not allow frozen food that has left the cold chain to be returned to commerce.
policy.claimableDesc: We accept claims under the following conditions:
policy.claimableItem1: Product received is wrong or not as ordered
policy.claimableItem2: Packaging is damaged or not airtight causing the product to thaw
policy.claimableItem3: Product received is incomplete from what was ordered
policy.claimablePhoto: Photo evidence is required when claiming: outer packaging photo, product photo, and shipping label photo.
policy.howToClaimStep1: Contact us via WhatsApp within 24 hours after product is received
policy.howToClaimStep2: Attach the necessary photos (packaging, product, shipping label)
policy.howToClaimStep3: Our team will verify within 1x24 business hours
policy.howToClaimStep4: If the claim is approved, refund or reshipping will be processed
policy.refundTimelineDesc: After the claim is approved, refund will be processed within 1-7 business days to the sender's account or through the original payment method. If payment is made via Midtrans (credit card, VA, etc.), refund will be credited according to Midtrans policy (3-14 business days).
policy.wrongAddressTitle: Product Not Received Due to Wrong Address
policy.wrongAddressDesc: If the package is returned because the recipient's address is invalid or unreachable, we will contact you for re-confirmation. Second shipping costs are borne by the buyer.

account.howToRedeemDesc: Points can be used at checkout. Select "Use My Points" on the payment page to redeem your points.
account.pointsPerThousandDesc: Every purchase earns loyalty points based on the total spend (excluding shipping and discounts).
account.registrationBonusDesc: Points are credited when you create an account (when there's an active promo).
account.b2bBonusDesc: B2B accounts earn double points from every transaction.

metadata.homeTitle: Dapur Dekaka | Premium Frozen Food from Bandung
metadata.homeDescription: Heritage Chinese-Indonesian flavors, now at your home. Premium frozen dimsum, siomay, bakso from Bandung. Order online, ship across Indonesia.
metadata.blogDescription: Articles and tips about frozen food, recipes, and interesting information from Dapur Dekaka. Find cooking inspiration with premium frozen food products.
metadata.productsDescription: Explore our complete collection of premium frozen food: dimsum, siomay, bakso, lumpia, and pangsit. All products are 100% halal and shipped fresh across Indonesia.
metadata.aboutDescription: Dapur Dekaka is a premium Chinese-Indonesian frozen food producer from Bandung. Halal-certified dimsum, siomay, and bakso.
metadata.productsNotFoundDesc: Try another category or remove filters
